arts.ttl: Jeremy Doku aims Trent Alexander-Arnold jibe after Man City vs Liverpool - 'The amount of times'
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Trent Alexander-Arnold went head-to-head with Jeremy Doku during Sunday's -2-0 win

arts.ttl: 'Absolutely s*** themselves' - Sam Allardyce makes Ballon d'Or claim over Liverpool star Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Former Everton boss Sam Allardyce has explained why he thinks there is no chance Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah will win the Ballon d'Or

arts.ttl: ‘Look at him’: Ian Wright says he’s completely changed his mind about £60m Liverpool player
arts.sum: To a man, Liverpool have been absolutely brilliant this season. Indeed, the Reds are top of the Premier League for a reason, and the title...

arts.ttl: Analysis: Szoboszlai becoming two players in one for Liverpool
arts.sum: Liverpool have scored more goals from fast breaks (defined as an attempt created after the defensive team quickly turn defence into attack after winning the ball in their own half) than any other team in the Premier League this season (12). Liverpool ’s No 8 played a key role in a 2-0 win away to the reigning champions Manchester City, setting up his side’s first and scoring the second in a result that appears to have had a seismic impact on the title race.

arts.ttl: Liverpool star could miss out on Premier League winners' medal despite being in first-team
arts.sum: A blockbuster Liverpool signing looks set to miss out on a Premier League winners' medal if, as expected, Arne Slot's side go on to clinch the title this season

arts.ttl: Newcastle United find new PSR ally who has not held back despite Tottenham link
arts.sum: That is the verdict of former Spurs and England goalkeeper Paul Robinson after Newcastle boss Eddie Howe admitted 'it will take time' for the Magpies to close the gap on the top. Although Premier League clubs are currently trialling squad cost rules and top-to-bottom anchoring in shadow, the current PSR regulations, which limit losses to £105m over a rolling three-year period, look set to remain in place next season as Robinson noted.

arts.ttl: Six players could miss Liverpool vs Newcastle Premier League clash with injury
arts.sum: Latest Liverpool news and gossip as Arne Slot and Co. prepare to face Newcastle United in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah given new Ballon d'Or verdict after Jamie Carragher backlash - 'Not perfect'
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has been told he should be the main contender to win the Ballon d'Or, as the fierce debate over the Liverpool forward's chances of winning the award rumbles on

arts.ttl: Player ‘back to being earthly’ as Liverpool transfer looms – No longer performing miracles
arts.sum: Incoming Liverpool signing Giorgi Mamardashvili ‘is back to being earthly’ at Valencia and faces being relegated to the bench. That’s according to AS, who report on the Liverpool summer signing today and how he currently finds himself facing questions. arts.ttl: How Newcastle's freedom of play blew Forest away
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2 pundits Mark Chapman, Troy Deeney and Joe Hart analyse Newcastle United's performance against Nottingham Forest in their 4-3 Premier League win.
